title: Deployment Strategist
must_haves: Min 2 years in a fast-paced, analytical, or client-facing environment
SQL proficiency + comfortable working directly with large datasets
Communicate across executive and frontline levels
In-person with London team 5 days/week, willing to travel to manufacturing sites
hard_blockers: SQL is a hard requirement and Ryan has no demonstrated SQL/data-querying production experience
Enterprise manufacturing-operations domain, not crypto/Web3 or community-led growth
met_strengths: Agentic-AI builder; comfortable with ambiguity and ownership
Strong communicator with execs (investor-facing) and operators
one_line_verdict: Lower experience bar (2 yrs) than peers, but the hard SQL/large-dataset requirement plus manufacturing domain make this a stretch for a non-technical operator.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via company careers page (deployferry.io). Requirements (SQL required, Python nice-to-have, 5 days in-person, posted Jan 2026) verified via WebFetch of the direct URL.
